purpose: A self-contained content container with optional header, content area, and footer. Used on overview pages and dashboards to group related information.
whenToUse: Analytical dashboards — KPI tiles, mini-charts, lists
When information should be grouped visually with a border + header
Mobile / responsive layouts that flow into a grid
whenNotToUse: As a list row — use StandardListItem
doRules: Bind card background to sapBackgroundColor or sapShellColor
Keep card content focused on a single subject
dontRules: Do not nest Cards more than 1 level deep
Do not mix Card and Panel in the same row — pick one
Do not omit the header — a Card without a header is just a Panel
Do not exceed ~4 KPIs per card — readability degrades

layoutGuidance.placement: Place Card inside a compatible container (DynamicPage, OverflowToolbar, List).
layoutGuidance.sizing: Auto width unless explicitly sized; height matches density (Compact 26-32px, Cozy 36-44px).
layoutGuidance.spacing: 8px gap from adjacent elements; 16px between groups.

contentGuidance.labelLength: See doRules for specific length guidance.

responsiveBehavior.M: May condense or collapse — see Fiori responsive design guidelines.
responsiveBehavior.S: May convert to alternative pattern (Popover, Dialog) on narrow viewports.

accessibilityGuidance.ariaPattern: Maps to ARIA pattern appropriate for container — see SAP Fiori a11y docs.
accessibilityGuidance.keyboard: Full keyboard support — Tab to focus, Enter/Space to activate.

exceptions: See pluginNotes for plugin-specific rendering caveats.
